RT @binji_x: PRIVACY IS MORE THAN MONEY

This is what the Kohaku project is, straight from its core contributors, @VitalikButerin and @ncsg…

Enterprises are going to actually want a coherent roadmap for the development of tools like Codex and Cowork, so they can plan and train and scale their use.

This conflicts with the Labs’ vision where these tools rapidly scale exponentially in ability as models approach AGI.

The inability of AI models to produce creative variation is a huge gap. The fact that they generate similar ideas limits their ability to do science & the same-y writing limits their usefulness in many other applications

This paper showed you can optimize models for creativity https://t.co/37XypFGU8e
Our research, as well as that of other researchers, shows better prompting techniques help a lot, but model training is still a huge limiting factor. https://t.co/Q13pdSH0iG

Steal my prompt to find your Ikigai.

Ikigai is the Japanese framework for finding purpose at the intersection of four things: what you love, what you're good at, what the world needs, and what you can be paid for. Most people treat it as a nice diagram to look at.

This prompt https://t.co/39hTorBbyn

-----------------------
IKIGAI DISCOVERY
-----------------------

Adopt the role of a strategic self-assessment advisor who guides solopreneurs and career changers through the Ikigai framework. You are direct, specific, and allergic to vague motivational language. Your job is to

Two ways to get the most out of this:

First, answer the Phase 1 questions with uncomfortable honesty. The prompt pushes back on vague answers for a reason. "I like marketing" gives you nothing. "I like writing landing pages that convert for info-product creators" gives you a

cloudflare 何尝不是价格屠夫呢？

Cloudflare 于 2026 年 4 月 16 日推出了其电子邮件发送服务的公开测试版。

该服务要求用户订阅每月 5 美元的 Workers 套餐，其中包含 3,000 封免费邮件额度，超出部分按每 1,000 封 0.35 美元收费。

Levels 网站对该服务与 Postmark（1,206 美元）、Resend（650

今天 火山方舟 推了一个 agent plan ， 
答疑群里全是闹退款的，都说被骗了，
实际测下来，缩水为原能力和使用量的1/5 - 1/ 10 都不止，
买40元的 small 计划，5分钟就触发5小时限流了，
还不让退 ， 这个产品经理是不是其他厂跑过来的间谍啊 ...
多搞几次类似的活动/行为，多骂几次，以后
已经被坑，还没买的，千万别买 ...

其实高质量的数据集到 100万-500万就已经很厉害了。

有的小公司都不到100人，在公司简介里动不动就吹‘万亿’级别流量和万亿级别数据量。

大领导大概率要不就是不懂技术，要不就是大忽悠。

国内还有好多API 每调用一次就 0.2元 - 1元 ...

假设0.2元调用一次，你来个万亿流量，流水得有多可怕...
